org.siprop.v2.ua
Interface UAContext

All Superinterfaces:
Context, java.io.Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultSIPUAContext, UAContextImpl
public interface UAContext
extends Context

This interface holds the message about a dialog or session for UA.

Author:
noritsuna
